parameters.jsCode:
const d = $('Parse Triage Result').item.json;
return [{ json: { ...d } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ "text": "🚨 *" + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.priority + " TICKET* — #" + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.ticket_id + "
*Customer:* " + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.customer_name + " (" + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.customer_tier + ") | *Channel:* " + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.channel + "
*Subject:* " + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.subject + "
*Category:* " + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.category + " | *Sentiment:* " + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.sentiment + " | *Churn Risk:* " + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.churn_risk + "
*Assigned:* " + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.assigned_team + " | *SLA:* " + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.sla_hours + "h
*Agent Brief:* " + (($('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.agent_summary) ? ($('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.agent_summary).substring(0, 200) : '') }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '🚨 [' + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.priority + '] Ticket #' + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.ticket_id + ' — ' + $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.customer_name }}
parameters.message:
⚠️ {{ $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.priority }} — Ticket #{{ $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.ticket_id }}

Customer: {{ $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.customer_name }} ({{ $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.customer_tier }})
Channel: {{ $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.channel }}
Subject: {{ $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.subject }}
Sentiment: {{ $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.sentiment }} | Churn Risk: {{ $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.churn_risk }}
SLA: {{ $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.sla_hours }} hours | Team: {{ $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.assigned_team }}

Agent Brief

{{ $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.agent_summary }}

Original Message

{{ $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json.message }}

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json;
const tags = (d.tags && Array.isArray(d.tags)) ? d.tags.join(', ') : '';
return [{ json: {
  'Date': new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
  'Ticket ID': d.ticket_id || '',
  'Channel': d.channel || '',
  'Customer': d.customer_name || '',
  'Tier': d.customer_tier || '',
  'Subject': d.subject || '',
  'Priority': d.priority || '',
  'Category': d.category || '',
  'Sentiment': d.sentiment || '',
  'Churn Risk': d.churn_risk || '',
  'Assigned Team': d.assigned_team || '',
  'SLA Hours': String(d.sla_hours || ''),
  'VIP': d.vip_customer ? 'Yes' : 'No',
  'Tags': tags,
  'Reasoning': (d.reasoning || '').substring(0, 200),
  'Processed At': d.processing_timestamp || new Date().toISOString()
}}];

const d = $('Prep Escalation Data').item.json;
return [{ json: {
  status: 'escalated',
  ticket_id: d.ticket_id,
  customer: d.customer_name,
  priority: d.priority,
  category: d.category,
  assigned_team: d.assigned_team,
  sla_hours: d.sla_hours,
  churn_risk: d.churn_risk,
  vip: d.vip_customer,
  actions_taken: ['Slack escalation alert sent', 'Agent notification email sent', 'Logged to Support Log sheet'],
  processed_at: d.processing_timestamp
}}];

const d = $('Parse Triage Result').item.json;
return [{ json: { ...d } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ "text": "📋 *New Ticket* — #" + $('Prep Standard Data').item.json.ticket_id + " (" + $('Prep Standard Data').item.json.priority + ")
*Customer:* " + $('Prep Standard Data').item.json.customer_name + " | *Channel:* " + $('Prep Standard Data').item.json.channel + "
*Subject:* " + $('Prep Standard Data').item.json.subject + "
*Category:* " + $('Prep Standard Data').item.json.category + " | *SLA:* " + $('Prep Standard Data').item.json.sla_hours + "h | *Queue:* " + $('Prep Standard Data').item.json.assigned_team }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Re: ' + $('Prep Standard Data').item.json.subject + ' [Ticket #' + $('Prep Standard Data').item.json.ticket_id + ']' }}
parameters.message:
={{ $('Prep Standard Data').item.json.auto_response + '

Ticket #: ' + $('Prep Standard Data').item.json.ticket_id + '
Expected response within: ' + $('Prep Standard Data').item.json.sla_hours + ' hours

Best regards,
Support Team' }}

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $('Prep Standard Data').item.json;
const tags = (d.tags && Array.isArray(d.tags)) ? d.tags.join(', ') : '';
return [{ json: {
  'Date': new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
  'Ticket ID': d.ticket_id || '',
  'Channel': d.channel || '',
  'Customer': d.customer_name || '',
  'Tier': d.customer_tier || '',
  'Subject': d.subject || '',
  'Priority': d.priority || '',
  'Category': d.category || '',
  'Sentiment': d.sentiment || '',
  'Churn Risk': d.churn_risk || '',
  'Assigned Team': d.assigned_team || '',
  'SLA Hours': String(d.sla_hours || ''),
  'VIP': d.vip_customer ? 'Yes' : 'No',
  'Tags': tags,
  'Reasoning': (d.reasoning || '').substring(0, 200),
  'Processed At': d.processing_timestamp || new Date().toISOString()
}}];

const d = $('Prep Standard Data').item.json;
return [{ json: {
  status: 'queued',
  ticket_id: d.ticket_id,
  customer: d.customer_name,
  priority: d.priority,
  category: d.category,
  assigned_team: d.assigned_team,
  sla_hours: d.sla_hours,
  churn_risk: d.churn_risk,
  vip: d.vip_customer,
  actions_taken: ['Auto-response email sent to customer', 'Slack digest posted', 'Logged to Support Log sheet'],
  processed_at: d.processing_timestamp
}}];

const error = $input.item.json;
return [{ json: { error_message: error.message || 'Unknown error', timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), workflow: 'AI Support Triage' } }];
